exemplar.title: CREATE A WEBSITE ON ADOLESCENT MENTAL WELL-BEING

detailedExemplarData.title: CREATE A WEBSITE ON ADOLESCENT MENTAL WELL-BEING

strengths: Strategic integration of performance and security plugins in WordPress, illustrating advanced technical ATL skills
Implementation of multilingual options and curated recommendations reflects user-centered design and enhances accessibility
Use of the APA evaluation method for source credibility strengthens the reliability of your content
Development of a comprehensive research plan with targeted questions demonstrates purposeful application of research skills
Effective organization of varied sources by disorder showcases disciplined research skill application with clear evidence
Combination of teacher-guided tutorials and self-directed YouTube learning shows proficient use of digital learning ATL skills
Balancing professional literature with personal narratives indicates nuanced evaluation and synthesis abilities
Application of creative and critical thinking to logically structure content reflects mature thinking skill deployment
Self-discipline and schedule management narrative highlights strong self-management skills supporting timely delivery
weaknesses: Identification of communication ATL skills is noted but the description is truncated and lacks evidence of audience impact
The section on communication skills needs expansion to detail how engagement was measured and how messaging was adjusted based on feedback
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: You apply a broad range of ATL skillsâtechnical, research, thinking and self-managementâwith clear, relevant examples that show effectiveness in developing your product and meeting learning goals. Strengthen this section by elaborating on your communication strategies: provide specific evidence of audience responses, describe the measures you used to gauge engagement, and explain any adjustments made as a result.

strengths: Clear, detailed learning goals that connect to personal experience and show genuine engagement with source evaluation
Comprehensive product success criteria table with specific, measurable outcomes (navigation clarity, quiz accuracy, language options)
Use of both a narrative journal and an Excel tracker to monitor progress and enhance accountability
Identification of key interactive features (language options, quizzes) that align product design with success criteria
Inclusion of an anonymous messaging platform demonstrating thoughtful consideration of user privacy and support
weaknesses: Complementary questions list is overly broad and needs prioritization to maintain focus and manage scope
Initial featureâcriteria table lacks clear sequencing and resource details such as deadlines and required tools
Rationale for defining success criteria is sound but does not specify how each criterion will be assessed quantitatively
Detailed timeline omits explanations for delays and lacks contingency plans to address potential challenges
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your planning demonstrates a strong foundation with well-articulated goals, measurable success criteria and robust tracking methods. You show clear alignment between user needs and product features. To strengthen feasibility and focus, refine your scope of inquiry, integrate sequencing and resource details into your task plan, explicitly define how you will measure each criterion, and build in brief notes on potential delays and contingency strategies.

strengths: Reflection on information organization strategies (annotated bibliographies, citation tools) demonstrates strong metacognitive awareness and effective strategy adjustment
Linking project outcomes to future career skills shows deep insight into the long-term impact on your learning trajectory
Inclusion of a detailed evaluation table that maps strengths and weaknesses to each success criterion facilitates clear product assessment
weaknesses: The evaluation table header is present but lacks the specific content or illustrative examples needed for a thorough assessment
The reflection section ends mid-sentence and misses a synthesis of key insights; it needs expansion to fully articulate how challenges shaped your learning
feedback.calculationMethod: Mini report holistic evaluation: Your reflections reveal strong metacognitive skills and meaningful connections between this project and your future goals. The evaluation framework is in place, but you need to populate it with concrete evidence and examples. Additionally, extend your narrative to complete your synthesis of challenges and lessons learned, ensuring a comprehensive reflection on your personal growth.

annotations.comment: Strategic integration of performance and security plugins in WordPress shows high-level technical ATL skill application with focus on functionality.
Your complementary questions list is comprehensive but overly broad; prioritise the most critical inquiries to maintain focus and manage scope.
Implementing multilingual options and curated recommendations directly demonstrates user-centered design thinking, enhancing accessibility and engagement.
Adopting the APA evaluation method for source credibility shows thoughtful selection of evidence and strengthens the reliability of your content.

You establish clear, detailed learning goals connected to personal experience and critical evaluation of sources, providing a strong foundation for planning and demonstrating genuine personal interest.
Your product success criteria table is comprehensive, listing specific measurable outcomes (navigation clarity, quiz accuracy, language options) that guide focused development.
You identify communication ATL skills but your narrative is truncated and lacks evidence of impact; expand on specific outcomes and audience responses.
The initial featureâcriteria table lacks clear sequencing and resource details for each task; consider adding deadlines and required tools to strengthen feasibility.
Your use of both a narrative journal and Excel tracker demonstrates a robust monitoring strategy, enhancing accountability and progress visibility.
The rationale for defining success criteria is sound but lacks direct linkage to measurable outcomes; specify how you will assess each criterion quantitatively.
Your detailed timeline table shows progress but omits explanations for delays and contingency plans; integrate brief notes on challenges and mitigations.
Formulating a comprehensive research plan with targeted questions illustrates strong ATL research skill application and purposeful information gathering.
You effectively leveraged varied sources and organized research documents per disorder, demonstrating disciplined application of research ATL skills with clear evidence.
Combining teacher-guided WordPress tutorials with self-directed YouTube research reflects proficient and effective application of digital learning skills.
The heading for communication skills is present but the following description is incomplete; detail how you measured engagement and adjusted messaging.
Balancing professional literature with personal narratives demonstrates nuanced evaluation and synthesis of diverse perspectives.
You apply creative and critical thinking skills to organize content logically, reflecting mature ATL thinking skill deployment.
Your account of self-discipline and schedule management illustrates strong self-management ATL skills supporting timely project delivery.
Identifying key interactive features (language options, quizzes) shows clear alignment between product design and your defined success criteria.
Including an anonymous messaging platform reflects thoughtful consideration of user privacy and support, enhancing product relevance.
Your reflection on organizing information (annotated bibliographies, citation tools) demonstrates strong metacognitive skills and effective strategy adjustments.
Linking project outcomes to future career skills (psychology practice, technical proficiency) shows deep insight into the impact on your learning trajectory.
The evaluation table header is in place but lacks accompanying content or examples; complete each cell with specific evidence for a thorough assessment.
Your detailed evaluation table maps strengths and weaknesses to each success criterion, facilitating clear product assessment.
This reflection section ends mid-sentence and misses synthesis of key insights; expand to fully articulate how challenges shaped your learning.
